position: Post-doc Research at University of Liege
bio: I am a post-doc researcher at the University of Liège now. I am a marine ecologist specializing in species distribution modelling (SDMs), ecosystem modelling, and Dynamic Energy Budget (DEB) coupled Individual-based models (IBMs). My research focuses on understanding and optimizing artificial reef layouts, marine ranching, and fish population dynamics under environmental stressors such as hypoxia and climate change. My work integrates field data and modelling approaches to support sustainable marine resource management.
